blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
